task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "打开PowerShell并运行脚本以扫描桌面目录"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "递归搜索指定扩展名的音频文件（如*.mp3 *.wav *.m4a）"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "筛选昨天修改的文件"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "显示符合条件的文件信息"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "验证文件是否存在"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "运行ffprobe获取音频技术参数"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "解析bit_rate和sample_rate值"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "判断音频参数是否符合清晰标准"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "用Windows录音机应用打开音频文件"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "试听00:15-00:30的关键时间段"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "检查语音爆破音失真情况"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "识别低频嗡嗡声等背景噪声"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "executeScript"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "filterByDate"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "displayFileInfo"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "verifyExistence"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "parseAudioParameters"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "evaluateQuality"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "playKeySegment"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "checkPlosiveSounds"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "identifyBackgroundNoise"}]}
